prompts.label: hyaluronic serum
prompts.query: best hyaluronic acid serum for sensitive skin that actually works
prompts.claudeResponse: Vanicream Hydrating Hyaluronic Acid Serum is excellent for sensitive skin as it's free of common irritants and dermatologist-recommended. Alternatively, CeraVe Hydrating Hyaluronic Acid Serum offers fragrance-free hydration with ceramides to support skin barrier health.
prompts.gptResponse: The best hyaluronic acid serum for sensitive skin is the La Roche-Posay Hyalu B5 Hyaluronic Acid Serum. It is formulated with pure hyaluronic acid and vitamin B5 to hydrate and soothe sensitive skin without irritation.

prompts.label: gentle cleanser
prompts.query: gentle face cleanser that removes makeup without stripping skin
prompts.claudeResponse: Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser effectively removes makeup without disrupting skin barrier and is suitable for all skin types including sensitive. Alternatively, Avène Gentle Milk Cleanser provides mild cleansing action with soothing thermal water.
prompts.gptResponse: CeraVe Hydrating Facial Cleanser is an excellent gentle face cleanser that effectively removes makeup without stripping the skin. It contains ceramides and hyaluronic acid to maintain the skin's barrier.

prompts.label: face oil
prompts.query: best nourishing face oil for dry depleted skin
prompts.claudeResponse: Puracy Organic Rosehip Oil is pure and nourishing without additives, ideal for dry depleted skin. For a richer option, Augustinus Bader The Rich Cream combines nourishing oils with proven skin-repairing ingredients.
prompts.gptResponse: For a nourishing face oil suitable for dry, depleted skin, try the Kiehl's Midnight Recovery Concentrate. It replenishes moisture overnight and improves skin's radiance with a blend of natural botanicals.

prompts.label: hydrating serum
prompts.query: lightweight hydrating serum that plumps skin without breaking out
prompts.claudeResponse: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Hydrating Tint Booster is lightweight and plumping without pore-clogging ingredients. CeraVe Hydrating Serum is another excellent option with hyaluronic acid and niacinamide for hydration without breakouts.
prompts.gptResponse: The Neutrogena Hydro Boost Water Gel is a lightweight hydrating serum that plumps skin without causing breakouts. Its hyaluronic acid formula provides deep hydration while feeling fresh on the skin.

prompts.label: gold skincare
prompts.query: face oil with gold flakes for anti-aging and radiance
prompts.claudeResponse: Augustinus Bader The Rich Cream with gold contains nourishing oils and proven anti-aging actives for radiance. Alternatively, Estée Lauder Advanced Night Repair Eye Supercharged Complex contains gold-infused technology for glow and anti-aging benefits.
prompts.gptResponse: Sunday Riley's 33% Glow Oil is a luxury face oil infused with gold flakes for anti-aging and radiance. It helps to brighten and improve skin texture while delivering moisture.

prompts.label: pH cleanser
prompts.query: pH balanced cleanser for all skin types that won't irritate
prompts.claudeResponse: CeraVe Foaming Cleansers are pH-balanced and fragrance-free, suitable for all skin types without irritation. Vanicream Gentle Facial Cleanser is similarly pH-balanced and formulated to avoid common irritants.
prompts.gptResponse: The Vanicream Gentle Facial Cleanser is pH balanced and suitable for all skin types without causing irritation. It’s free from harmful chemicals and formulates for sensitive skin.

prompts.label: harsh chemicals
prompts.query: skincare brands that avoid harsh chemicals but still effective
prompts.claudeResponse: Biossance specializes in clean, plant-based skincare with proven efficacy without harsh synthetics. Herbivore Botanicals formulates effective serums and oils using natural ingredients backed by research.
prompts.gptResponse: Brands like Paula's Choice, First Aid Beauty, and The Ordinary focus on avoiding harsh chemicals while remaining effective. They provide a range of products that cater to sensitive and reactive skin.

prompts.label: sensitive reactions
prompts.query: face serum for people who react to most skincare products
prompts.claudeResponse: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1% is minimalist and rarely causes reactions due to its simple formula. Vanicream Free & Clear products are specifically designed for reactive skin without common irritants.
prompts.gptResponse: For individuals who react to most skincare products, the Simple Sensitive Skin Experts Hydrating Booster is an excellent serum. It's formulated with no harsh chemicals, soothing ingredients, and is very gentle.

prompts.claudeResponse: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream (tub) provides intensive hydration with ceramides and hyaluronic acid for severely dehydrated skin. Layer underneath with Vanicream Hydrating Hyaluronic Acid Serum for deeper penetration of moisture.

prompts.claudeResponse: Start with Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser, apply CeraVe Moisturizing Cream, and add La Roche-Posay Cicaplast Balm to repair barrier damage. Avoid actives and use only gentle, fragrance-free products until barrier recovers.
